title: Jade lzh Translation
description: A Classical Chinese translation pack for mod 'Jade'.
body:
# Jade lzh Translation
It's a **Classical Chinese** translation pack for '[Jade🔍](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)' mod. 

Actually, I have already submitted the pull request to the Jade developer, but he refused to approve. So I made the pack.![Jade Translated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IyGQcCF6/images/7abd3ce1ffb24889b2b831d45ee941cbc818cd88.png)


## How to use
1. Make sure that you have load **Jade**🔍 mod.
2. Dowload the latest resouse pack.
3. Put it in 'resousepack' folder and load.
4. Change your language into **```文言(華夏)```**.
5. Well Done! You can get to the Jade menu to check if it's translated right.
